home.title: Find an RPN association near you
home.description: Kamga starts with a public directory that helps people discover associations while building the verified dataset for future contribution workflows.
home.directoryDescription: Browse verified associations and open a profile to request membership.
home.emptyState: No active association matches this search.
home.descriptionFallback: This association has not published a detailed description yet.

login.title: Sign in to Kamga
login.description: Use a magic link or your organization-approved social account to access protected Kamga workspaces.
login.securityNote: Kamga protects member, association, evidence, payment, and review workflows behind authenticated access.
login.sentMessage: Check your inbox for a secure sign-in link.
login.errorMessage: We could not start sign-in. Try again or contact support.

dashboard.title: Dashboard access confirmed
dashboard.description: You are signed in. Upcoming tickets will replace this foundation screen with the member and association workflows.
dashboard.associationSubmitted: Your association registration was submitted for platform review.
dashboard.memberRegistrationPending: Your member registration is pending association admin review.
dashboard.applicationsDescription: Follow each association application and respond when more evidence is requested.
dashboard.noApplications: No member application has been submitted from this account yet.

application.memberFeaturesPlaceholder: Your membership is active. Full member features will appear here as the product roadmap unlocks them.
application.declineReasonMissing: No explanation was provided for this decision.
application.futureInvites: You can receive a new invitation if an association wants to restart your registration.

pending.title: Application under review
pending.description: Your file is waiting for an administrator decision. Kamga will notify you when the review is complete.

needs_more_evidence.title: More evidence needed
needs_more_evidence.description: An administrator needs additional documents before the review can continue.

active.title: Membership active
active.description: Welcome. Your application has been approved and your membership is active.

declined.title: Application declined
declined.description: Your application was declined after review. The explanation is shown below.

shares.title: Relatives and shares
shares.description: Add relatives or dependents associated with this membership. Share count is the registrant plus every listed relative.
shares.emptyState: No relative or dependent is associated with this membership yet.

errors.KMG-AUTH-403: You can manage relatives only for an active membership that belongs to you.
errors.KMG-RG-001: Check the relative details and try again.
errors.KMG-RG-404: This membership or relative could not be found.
errors.KMG-RG-409: This membership cannot be updated in its current state.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: The share list could not be updated. Try again or contact support.

dashboard.incomingCallsDescription: Track calls sent to your associations, owed amounts, and contribution deadlines.
dashboard.memberContributionsDescription: Review calls assigned to you, share count, amount owed, and payment status.
dashboard.noMemberContributions: No member contribution has been generated for this call yet.
dashboard.paymentSuccess: Payment confirmed. The receipt will appear here after Stripe confirms the session.
dashboard.paymentCancelled: Payment cancelled. No amount was applied.
dashboard.joinRequest: Your membership request was sent to the association administrator.
dashboard.joinRequestsDescription: Review requests submitted from the public directory by applicants who want to join your associations.
dashboard.activeLeveesDescription: Track current levees and the payment status of your contribution.
dashboard.contributionHistoryDescription: Review all past contributions, paid amounts, receipts, and associated dates.
dashboard.adminFeeTransparencyDescription: This contribution includes an estimated {amount} administration fee configured by the platform for association operations.

financialSettings.title: Financial settings
financialSettings.description: Manage payment preferences and saved payment methods for future contribution calls.
financialSettings.manualDescription: You choose when to pay each contribution after an active call is assigned.
financialSettings.autoPayDescription: Use the saved Stripe payment method automatically when auto-pay support is enabled for calls.
financialSettings.paymentMethodSaved: A Stripe customer profile is linked.
financialSettings.portalDescription: Open Stripe customer portal to add or update your saved payment method.

errors.KMG-AUTH-403: You do not have permission to update these settings.
errors.KMG-LV-001: Check the submitted values and try again.
errors.KMG-LV-404: This record could not be found.
errors.KMG-PAY-001: The payment settings request is invalid.
errors.KMG-PAY-CONFIG: Stripe is not configured for this environment yet.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: Financial settings could not be updated. Try again or contact support.

fiscalSlips.title: Annual tax receipts
fiscalSlips.description: Download or email a PDF receipt that summarizes recorded contribution payments for a fiscal year.
fiscalSlips.emailSent: The fiscal receipt was emailed to your account address.

errors.KMG-FS-404: No recorded contribution payment exists for this fiscal year.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: The fiscal receipt could not be sent. Try again or contact support.

admin.title: Admin access confirmed
admin.description: Only platform administrators can reach this route. Upcoming tickets will add operational tools here.

admin.title: Admin fees
admin.description: Configure transparent administration fees per association, track accrued balances for active association admins, and pay them manually or through Stripe Connect when a connected account is available.
admin.emptyAssociations: No association is available for fee configuration yet.
admin.enabledLabel: Accrue admin fees for new member contribution payments.
admin.balancesDescription: Balances are accrued from real member contribution payments and grouped by active association admin.
admin.emptyAdmins: No active association admin is attached to this association yet.
admin.recentPayoutsDescription: Review completed and failed payout attempts across associations.
admin.emptyPayouts: No admin fee payout has been recorded yet.

errors.KMG-AUTH-403: You are not allowed to manage admin fees.
errors.KMG-FEE-001: Check the fee settings and try again.
errors.KMG-FEE-404: No accrued fee is available for payout.
errors.KMG-FEE-STRIPE-CONFIG: Stripe Connect is not configured for this association or environment.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: Admin fees could not be updated. Try again or contact support.

admin.title: Reports
admin.description: Monitor levee collection rates, member contribution history, fiscal summaries, member rosters, share counts, admin fee earnings, and the operational audit trail.
admin.leveeReportsDescription: Collection rate, payment timeline, targets, deadlines, and association completion for recent levees.
admin.emptyLevees: No levee report is available yet.
admin.emptyBreakdown: No association breakdown is available yet.
admin.memberReportsDescription: Contribution history by member, association, levee, amount, payment count, and status.
admin.emptyMembers: No member contribution report is available yet.
admin.emptyFiscal: No fiscal summary is available yet.
admin.totalSharesValue: {count} shares in the displayed roster rows.
admin.emptyRoster: No member roster row is available yet.
admin.feeEarningsDescription: Accrued, paid, and total fee earnings by association admin.
admin.emptyFees: No admin fee earning has been recorded yet.
admin.auditDescription: Recent database changes captured for transparency. Sensitive payloads are not stored in the audit log.
admin.emptyAudit: No audit event has been captured yet.
admin.auditNote: The audit trail is forward-looking from this migration onward. It records inserts, updates, and deletes on operational tables without storing full sensitive row payloads.

admin.description: Onboard 3 to 5 pilot associations, track guided setup, support data migration, and capture feedback for the iteration loop.
admin.emptyState: No pilot association has been onboarded yet.
admin.feedbackDescription: Record feedback from setup sessions, migrated data checks, member tests, and operational reviews.
admin.feedbackEmpty: No feedback has been captured for this pilot association yet.
admin.notesPlaceholder: Operational notes, migration scope, risks, next contact...
admin.operatingModelDescription: Use this module as the operational cockpit for the pilot. Keep only real associations here, update progress after each guided setup session, record migration blockers, and convert feedback into iteration notes.
admin.title: Pilot program

errors.KMG-AUTH-403: You do not have permission to manage the pilot program.
errors.KMG-PL-001: Check the pilot program values and try again.
errors.KMG-PL-404: This pilot record could not be found.
errors.KMG-PL-409: This association is already in the pilot or the pilot already has five associations.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: The pilot program could not be updated. Try again or contact support.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: {count, plural, =0 {No unread notification} one {# unread notification} other {# unread notifications}}

errors.KMG-AUTH-403: You do not have permission to send this notification.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: The notification could not be sent. Try again or contact support.

admin.title: Create a levee
admin.description: Open a new levee by recording deceased information, target amount, deadline, and a locked share calculation from the current active membership pool.
admin.poolScopeValue: Registrant shares plus relatives across all active memberships.
admin.calculationValue: Per-share amount = target amount / pool size.
admin.calculationHelp: The pool and per-share amount are calculated and stored when the levee is created.
admin.listDescription: Each levee keeps the pool size and per-share amount calculated at creation time.
admin.emptyState: No levee has been created yet.

errors.KMG-AUTH-403: You do not have permission to create levees.
errors.KMG-LV-001: Check deceased information, target amount, and deadline before trying again.
errors.KMG-LV-002: No active shares are available for a levee.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: The levee could not be created. Try again or contact support.

admin.callsDescription: Each association receives a call calculated from its shares locked when the levee is created.
admin.callsEmpty: No association call was generated for this levee.

errors.KMG-AUTH-403: You do not have permission to update this call.
errors.KMG-LV-404: This levee call could not be found.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: The call status could not be updated. Try again or contact support.

errors.KMG-AUTH-403: You do not have permission to record this payment.
errors.KMG-LV-001: Check the paid amount. It must be between 0 and the amount owed.
errors.KMG-LV-404: This member contribution could not be found.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: The payment could not be recorded. Try again or contact support.

errors.KMG-AUTH-403: You can only pay your own contributions.
errors.KMG-LV-404: This contribution could not be found.
errors.KMG-PAY-001: This contribution cannot be paid online in its current state.
errors.KMG-PAY-CONFIG: Stripe is not configured for this environment yet.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: Online payment could not be started. Try again or contact support.

errors.KMG-AUTH-403: You do not have permission to mark this call as remitted.
errors.KMG-LV-003: Collection must be complete before remittance to the board.
errors.KMG-LV-404: This call could not be found.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: The remittance could not be recorded. Try again or contact support.

errors.KMG-AUTH-403: You do not have permission to close this levee.
errors.KMG-LV-003: The levee can close only after target is met or deadline has passed.
errors.KMG-LV-404: This levee could not be found.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: The levee could not be closed. Try again or contact support.

registration.title: Register an RPN association
registration.description: Submit the association profile and proof of RPN affiliation. A platform administrator will review the request before the association becomes active.
registration.reviewNotice: New associations remain pending until a platform administrator approves or suspends the record after manual review.
registration.authRequiredDescription: Create or access your Kamga account before submitting an association for review.
registration.proofHelp: Upload a PDF, PNG, or JPEG document. The file is stored privately and visible only to platform administrators during review.

fields.locationHelp: Only city is stored today. Street, province, postal code, and geocoding are disabled until the data model supports them.
fields.streetPlaceholder: Address fields are not stored yet
fields.geocodingPending: Geocoding will be enabled when address and coordinate fields are added to the data model.
fields.legitimacyDescription: Platform admins review the uploaded proof manually. Automatic registry checks are a future integration.
fields.registryPendingDescription: Automatic REQ verification is not connected yet.
fields.publicDescription: Contact details stay private unless a later privacy feature explicitly exposes them.

errors.KMG-AUTH-401: Sign in before submitting an association.
errors.KMG-RG-001: Check the required fields and try again.
errors.KMG-RG-003: The proof file must be 10 MB or smaller.
errors.KMG-RG-004: Use a PDF, PNG, or JPEG proof file.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: We could not complete the request. Try again or contact support.

admin.title: Association review queue
admin.description: Review self-registered associations, inspect their private RPN proof, and move each record from pending to active or suspended.
admin.emptyState: No associations are waiting in the review queue.

errors.KMG-AUTH-403: You do not have permission to review associations.
errors.KMG-RG-404: This association could not be found.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: We could not update the association. Try again or contact support.

profile.contactDescription: Contact is mediated by Kamga until the association explicitly opts in to publish a contact channel.
profile.descriptionFallback: This association has not published a detailed description yet.

join.description: Send a direct request to this association administrator. You will be notified after review.

errors.KMG-AUTH-401: Sign in before requesting to join an association.
errors.KMG-RG-404: This active association could not be found.
errors.KMG-RG-409: A request already exists for this association.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: The request could not be submitted. Try again or contact support.

admin.title: Referral links
admin.description: Generate referral links for active associations, monitor token usage, and decide whether active members may invite new applicants.
admin.noActiveAssociations: No active association is available for referral links yet.
admin.allowMemberReferralsLabel: Allow active members to generate referral links for this association.
admin.emptyTokens: No referral token has been generated yet.

errors.KMG-AUTH-401: Sign in before managing referral links.
errors.KMG-AUTH-403: You do not have permission to manage referral links for this association.
errors.KMG-REF-002: The association is not active for referrals.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: We could not update referral links. Try again or contact support.

registration.title: Validate your referral link
registration.description: Kamga checks the referral link before opening member registration for an active association.
registration.readyMessage: This referral is valid. The member registration form will open in the next registration step.

errors.KMG-REF-002: This referral link is not available for an active association.
errors.KMG-REF-004: This referral link has already been used.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: We could not validate this referral link. Try again or contact support.

adminMembers.title: Member applications
adminMembers.description: Filter member applications by status, open each full review file, and make a controlled decision with evidence and SIN lifecycle handling.
adminMembers.emptyState: No member application matches this filter.

review.description: Inspect the applicant, referrer, transient SIN, and verification evidence before making a final decision.
review.dependentsEmpty: No relative or dependent is associated with this membership.
review.declineReasonPlaceholder: Explain clearly why this application is declined.
review.declineReasonHelp: Allowed formatting: paragraphs, bold, italic, lists, and links. The explanation is sanitized before storage and email delivery.

errors.KMG-AUTH-403: You do not have permission to review this member application.
errors.KMG-RG-404: This member application or SIN token could not be found.
errors.KMG-RG-409: This member application cannot be reviewed in its current state.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: The member application could not be updated. Try again or contact support.

admin.title: Pending member applications
admin.description: Review referred member applications, inspect private evidence, reveal the SIN only when needed, then accept or decline the application. Terminal decisions destroy the transient SIN and verification evidence.
admin.emptyState: No member application is waiting for review.
admin.sinMaskedHelp: Masked by default. Reveals are audited.
admin.sinRevealedHelp: Visible for 30 seconds. Do not copy or store this value.

errors.KMG-AUTH-403: You do not have permission to review this member application.
errors.KMG-RG-404: This member application or SIN token could not be found.
errors.KMG-RG-409: This member application has already been reviewed.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: The member application could not be updated. Try again or contact support.

upload.title: Upload additional evidence
upload.description: Add a requested verification document to a pending member application. Files are stored privately and reviewed inline by an administrator.
upload.emptyState: No pending membership can receive additional evidence right now.
upload.help: Use a PDF, PNG, or JPEG file up to 10 MB.

errors.KMG-AUTH-403: You cannot upload evidence for this membership.
errors.KMG-RG-003: The file must be 10 MB or smaller.
errors.KMG-RG-004: Use a PDF, PNG, or JPEG file.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: The evidence could not be uploaded. Try again or contact support.

pwa.name: Kamga
pwa.description: Public RPN association lookup and contribution management foundation.

form.sinHelp: Your SIN is encrypted, held only for administrator review, and destroyed after the review decision. It is never stored permanently in your profile.
form.consentLabel: I consent to the association administrator viewing my documents for verification, and I understand the documents will be destroyed after verification.
form.sentMessage: Check your inbox, then return to Kamga from the secure link to complete registration.
form.authError: Authentication could not be started. Try again or contact support.

errors.KMG-RG-001: Check the required fields and consent before continuing.
errors.KMG-RG-003: The selected files are too large for secure browser handoff. Use smaller files or compressed images.
errors.KMG-RG-004: Use PDF, PNG, or JPEG files under the allowed size.

complete.title: Completing your registration
complete.description: Kamga is creating your pending membership and securely storing the verification documents.

errors.KMG-AUTH-401: Sign in again to complete registration.
errors.KMG-REF-004: This referral token is no longer available.
errors.KMG-RG-001: Your saved registration data is incomplete. Please restart from the referral link.
errors.KMG-RG-003: The saved documents are too large. Please restart with smaller files.
errors.KMG-RG-004: The verification documents could not be uploaded.
errors.KMG-SYS-000: Registration could not be completed. Try again or contact support.
